subject: fix(mobile): logo touch target, sticky hover, tab overflow, code scroll
body:
Applied fixes from the mobile UX (tap) trigger:

1. Logo touch target (high): Added min-h-11 (44px) to navbar logo link.
   Image stays 36px but tappable area meets WCAG AA minimum.

2. Sticky hover (medium): Wrapped .card-interactive:hover lift effect in
   @media (hover: hover) so it only applies on devices with a real hover
   pointer. Touch devices skip the lift and rely on :active (scale 0.98).

3. Tab bar overflow (medium): Added overflow-x-auto to project.html doc
   tabs container. On 320px phones with 4 tabs, the container now scrolls
   horizontally instead of cramping or clipping.

4. Code block scroll (medium-low): Added -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch
   to .md-render pre for momentum scrolling on older iOS.

Tags: mobile, ux, accessibility, touch-targets
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: parallel-audit-sweep
Semver: patch
